series_metadata.series_description: The Computer Usage Files contain electronic files, automated logs and web logs; created to monitor computer system usage by internal and external users. The Computer Usage Files may include (but are not limited to) log-in files, system usage files, data entry logs, records of individual computer program usage, websites usage and web page activity.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 1 year, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
